audit_status.source_base: Greek Gospel text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for John the Baptist, metanoeite, reign/realm of the heavens, wilderness Isaiah voice, Pharisees/Sadducees, fruit language, axe/root, Spirit and fire baptism, winnowing imagery, and Jesus' baptism/theophany.

verses.restored: In those days John the Baptist came proclaiming in the wilderness of Judea,
saying, Turn and realign your mind/heart, for the reign of the heavens has drawn near.
For this is the one spoken of through Isaiah the prophet: A voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare the way of the Lord; make his paths straight.
John himself had clothing from camel's hair and a leather belt around his waist, and his food was locusts and wild honey.
Then Jerusalem, all Judea, and all the region around the Jordan went out to him.
They were baptized by him in the Jordan River, confessing their sins/misalignments.
Seeing many of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to the baptism, he said to them, Offspring of vipers, who warned you to flee from the coming wrath?
Therefore produce fruit worthy of turning/realignment.
Do not suppose you can say among yourselves, We have Abraham as father; for I say to you that the Divine is able from these stones to raise up children for Abraham.
Already the axe lies at the root of the trees; every tree not producing beautiful/good fruit is cut down and thrown into fire.
I baptize you in water for turning/realignment, but the one coming after me is stronger than I; I am not worthy to carry his sandals. He will baptize you in holy Spirit and fire.
His winnowing fork is in his hand. He will thoroughly clear his threshing floor, gather his wheat into the storehouse, and burn the chaff with unquenchable fire.
Then Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to John, to be baptized by him.
But John tried to prevent him, saying, I have need to be baptized by you, and you come to me?
Jesus answered him, Allow it now, for in this way it is fitting for us to fulfill all righteousness/justice. Then he allowed him.
After being baptized, Jesus immediately came up from the water; and look, the heavens were opened, and he saw the Spirit of the Divine descending like a dove and coming upon him.
And look, a voice from the heavens said, This is my beloved Son, in whom I delight.
